message:
fix: use C extern for compressed_heap_base across frozen shards

Each frozen shard is compiled as a separate Zig compilation unit with
its own module instance. A Zig 'pub var' gets duplicated per unit, and
LLVM constant-folds each copy to 0. Even 'volatile' doesn't help because
the variable is still local to each shard.

Solution: define the variable in C (frozen_dispatch_cli.c) and reference
it as 'extern var edgebox_compressed_heap_base' in Zig. This forces all
compilation units to use the single global instance, which is set by
initCompressedHeap() at runtime before any frozen code executes.
